ValidationRule.description: Guarantor English Addres cannot be Imput!
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'NonLC',Possess_Guarantor_Y_N__c = false, NOT(ISBLANK( Guarantor_English_Address__c ))), TRUE, FALSE)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Guarantor English Addres Should be Empty! (Because there is no Possess Guarantor)
